form.formComment: Last start finished 2nd in a Mix 6/7 on April 13 over 595m at this track behind Opalite beaten 6 lengths (34.94). Found one better last time. Well placed and worth following up.

form.formComment: Form has been solid with minor placings at his last four starts. Last time out finished 2nd on April 10 over 460m at Warragul behind Raging Fury beaten 1.75 lengths (26.12) in a Mix 6/7. Has been thereabouts of late and is among the chances.

form.formComment: Form has been solid with minor placings at her last three starts. Last time out finished 3rd over 515m at this track beaten one length (30.02) behind Mikado Mania in a Mix 6/7 on April 13. Others have better credentials.
